complaints.message:
Confirm object synset assignment.
Object assigned to synset: sofa.n.01
Definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person
Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g. orange juice bottle needs to match orange_juice__bottle.n.01
and not orange_juice.n.01)

SYNSET: Confirm object synset assignment.

Object assigned to synset: sofa.n.01
Definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person

Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g., orange_juice.n.01 is the fluid orange juice and not a bottle).
For containers, note that usable containers (e.g. ones that have an open cap and
can be filled should be assigned to x__bottle.n.01 etc. synsets/categories while
non-usable containers should be assigned to bottle__of__x.n.01 etc. synsets/categories).

If the synset is wrong, please type in the name of the correct synset the object
should be assigned to. In the next question also type in the correct category.

ABILITIES: Confirm that this object can support all of the abilities seen below.

Abilities to evaluate (subset of all abilities): 
    cloth: False
    coldSource: False
    fillable: False
    heatSource: False
    openable: False
    particleApplier: False
    particleRemover: True
    particleSink: False
    particleSource: False
    toggleable: False

If this object looks like it should have some of these abilities flipped, please
list the abilities that we should flip for this object as a comma separated list.
For example, for an unopenable window you would put in 'openable'.

CATEGORY: Confirm object category assignment.

Object assigned to category: sofa

If the object is not compatible with the rest of the objects in this category,
(e.g. tabletop sink vs regular sink), change the category here.
Confirm that the object is the same kind of object as the rest of the objects
in this category.

If the category is wrong, please type in the correct category.
